headline: Sock Gnomes Revealed as Underground Resistance Movement Against Dryers
summary: They've been stealing left socks as political protest for decades.
fullBody: In a viral manifesto, the Sock Liberation Front admitted responsibility for missing footwear. 'Dryers are fascist machines,' they wrote. The group demands dryer-free zones and reparations in the form of unmatched pairs. Laundromats report record levels of single-sock anxiety.
